title: English C1.2
further_info: Recommended Reading The C1.2 level course will use a student textbook, Headway Advanced 5th edition Part B (Oxford University Press). Materials from other sources will be used at the discretion of the Instructor. The focus is on general and study-related language competencies. The class will cover advanced topics, such as technology, turning points in history, gender, and musical vocabulary. The level is based on the Common European Framework and will continue building on the skills from C1.1. The focus will be on mastering these goals.
